title: Public Utility Regulatory Policies Act
impact: Opened markets for independent power producers and early renewables.

title: Energy Policy Act of 2005
impact: Expanded incentives that accelerated wind and solar investment.

title: American Recovery and Reinvestment Act
impact: Large-scale public spending supported grid and clean energy deployment.

title: Electricity Feed-in Act
impact: Created guaranteed payments for renewable generation.

title: Renewable Energy Sources Act
impact: Scaled feed-in tariffs and rapidly expanded wind and solar.

title: Post-Fukushima Nuclear Phase-out Decision
impact: Accelerated power-sector restructuring toward renewables.

title: Renewables Obligation
impact: Established a key market mechanism for renewable electricity growth.

title: Climate Change Act
impact: Set legally binding carbon budgets that shaped power policy.

title: Power-sector Carbon Price Support
impact: Raised effective carbon costs and sped coal displacement.

title: Rapid Nuclear Buildout Strategy
impact: Drove long-run low-carbon electricity through nuclear expansion.

title: European Emissions Trading System Start
impact: Introduced carbon pricing signals for industry and power.

title: Energy Transition for Green Growth Law
impact: Expanded targets for efficiency and renewables.

title: Energy Conservation Act
impact: Institutionalized high-efficiency standards after oil shocks.

title: Fukushima Nuclear Accident
impact: Triggered a major reset of the generation mix and fuel imports.

title: National FIT Program
impact: Increased investment in solar and other renewables.

title: Wind Power Production Incentive
impact: Improved project economics for utility-scale wind.

title: National Climate Plan
impact: Aligned federal-provincial actions on carbon and clean growth.

title: Mandatory Renewable Energy Target
impact: Set national renewable obligations for electricity retailers.

title: Renewable Energy Target Expansion
impact: Raised long-term renewable deployment expectations.

title: Clean Energy Act
impact: Introduced an economy-wide carbon price with power-sector effects.

title: Carbon Price Repeal
impact: Reduced carbon-cost pressure on fossil generation.

title: Low-Carbon Green Growth Strategy
impact: Set national direction for efficiency and clean technology.

title: Renewable Portfolio Standard
impact: Replaced FIT and mandated renewable shares for large generators.

title: Korea Emissions Trading Scheme Launch
impact: Added carbon market signals for energy-intensive sectors.

title: Swedish Carbon Tax Reform
impact: Created sustained incentives to shift away from fossil fuels.

title: Electricity Certificate System
impact: Supported additional renewable capacity growth.

title: Vindeby Offshore Wind Farm
impact: Demonstrated commercial offshore wind and accelerated scaling.

title: Broad Cross-party Energy Deal
impact: Strengthened long-term renewable and efficiency targets.

title: Norwegian CO2 Tax Introduction
impact: Applied carbon pricing in key energy-related sectors.

title: Norway-Sweden Green Certificate Scheme
impact: Enabled additional renewable generation projects.

title: National Energy Agreement
impact: Expanded renewable and efficiency commitments.

title: Dutch Climate Agreement
impact: Set sectoral transition pathways, including power decarbonization.

title: Energy Policy Act of 1992
impact: Expanded federal efficiency standards and supported non-utility generation.

title: EPA Clean Power Plan
impact: Set federal emissions-reduction targets for the electricity sector.

title: Germany Energy Concept 2010
impact: Defined long-term decarbonization milestones and grid modernization goals.

title: Renewable Energy Sources Act Reform
impact: Shifted support toward auctions and restructured renewable expansion incentives.

title: Feed-in Tariffs in the United Kingdom
impact: Accelerated distributed solar PV adoption through guaranteed tariff payments.

title: Electricity Market Reform
impact: Introduced contracts-for-difference and capacity market mechanisms.

title: 2050 Net Zero Target in Climate Change Act
impact: Legally tightened long-run decarbonization requirements across sectors.

title: Grenelle Environnement Process
impact: Created a broad policy framework for efficiency and clean energy expansion.

title: Grenelle II Law
impact: Translated climate and energy objectives into enforceable implementation measures.

title: French Energy and Climate Law
impact: Updated national climate governance and sharpened low-carbon planning.

title: Top Runner Energy Efficiency Program
impact: Pushed appliance and vehicle efficiency standards via benchmark competition.

title: Renewable Portfolio Standard Law
impact: Required utilities to procure minimum quantities of renewable electricity.

title: Fourth Strategic Energy Plan
impact: Reset national power mix strategy after Fukushima and expanded diversification targets.

title: Green Energy and Green Economy Act (Ontario)
impact: Drove rapid wind and solar procurement through provincial feed-in tariffs.

title: Greenhouse Gas Pollution Pricing Act
impact: Established a federal carbon-pricing backstop affecting energy system choices.

title: Clean Energy Future Package
impact: Bundled carbon pricing, compensation, and clean energy support policies.

title: Renewable Energy (Electricity) Amendment Act 2015
impact: Recalibrated large-scale renewable targets and compliance settings.

title: Framework Act on Low Carbon, Green Growth
impact: Institutionalized national climate and green industry planning.

title: Third National Energy Master Plan
impact: Expanded medium-term direction for cleaner generation and demand-side management.

title: Cross-party Swedish Energy Agreement
impact: Set a durable political framework for long-run renewable electricity expansion.

title: Swedish Climate Act
impact: Required climate-policy planning cycles and strengthened accountability.

title: Danish Energy Agreement 2008
impact: Scaled efficiency and renewable deployment commitments before 2020.

title: Danish Energy Agreement 2018
impact: Raised offshore wind and clean-power targets with broad party support.

title: Norwegian Climate Change Act
impact: Embedded long-term emissions targets into national law.

title: Urgenda District Court Ruling
impact: Court decision increased pressure for stronger national emissions cuts.

title: Urgenda Supreme Court Decision
impact: Confirmed legal duty for faster near-term emissions reduction.

title: First Conto Energia Program
impact: Launched Italy's national feed-in support for solar photovoltaics.

title: Second Conto Energia Program
impact: Expanded PV incentives and accelerated utility and distributed installations.

title: Conclusion of Fifth Conto Energia
impact: Marked the end of direct feed-in support and a shift in policy instruments.

title: Royal Decree 661/2007
impact: Created powerful remuneration terms that triggered rapid renewable buildout.

title: Royal Decree 1578/2008
impact: Adjusted PV incentives after rapid growth and introduced tighter control.

title: Renewable Subsidy Moratorium
impact: Paused key incentive mechanisms and slowed new renewable investment.

title: Royal Decree 413/2014
impact: Replaced prior support rules with a new remuneration framework.

title: Federal Council Nuclear Phase-out Decision
impact: Redirected long-term planning toward efficiency and non-nuclear renewables.

title: Swiss Energy Act Referendum
impact: Voters approved a strategy promoting renewables and limiting new nuclear builds.

title: Finnish Carbon Tax Introduction
impact: One of the earliest national carbon taxes, shaping long-term fuel choices.

title: Act Banning Coal in Energy Use
impact: Set a legal end-point for coal use in energy production.

title: Climate Action and Low Carbon Development Act
impact: Created a statutory framework for national low-carbon transition planning.

title: Climate Action Plan 2019
impact: Defined sector-by-sector measures for electricity, transport, and buildings.

title: Climate Change Response (Emissions Trading) Amendment Act
impact: Established New Zealand's emissions trading framework across key sectors.

title: Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act
impact: Set a net-zero framework and formalized long-term climate governance.

title: Belgian Nuclear Phase-out Act
impact: Established legal timelines that shaped long-run generation planning.

title: Austrian Green Electricity Act
impact: Supported renewable generation through tariff-based mechanisms.
